summary.key_theme: 市場對 ServiceNow 的 AI 轉型潛力與長期競爭優勢持樂觀態度，但近期股價受宏觀市場波動及 AI 競爭擔憂影響而出現震盪。

bullish.title: ServiceNow (NOW) Products See Growth Amid Transformation into AI-Powered Enterprise Platform
bullish.reason: 機構投資者肯定 ServiceNow 成功轉型為 AI 驅動的企業平台，產品成長動能強勁。

bullish.title: ServiceNow Partnerships Aim To Make AI Agents Safer For Enterprise Workloads
bullish.reason: 透過強化 AI 安全性合作，提升了企業客戶對其 AI 代理的信任度，有助於擴大市佔率。

bullish.title: NOW's Subscription Growth Continues: Is Long-Term Momentum Secured?
bullish.reason: 訂閱收入成長 21 % 且積壓訂單穩健，顯示公司核心業務動能依然強勁。

bullish.title: ServiceNow (NOW) Sold Off on AI Fears but Long-Term Competitive Edge Remains Intact
bullish.reason: 投資機構認為近期拋售過度，強調其長期競爭優勢並未因市場情緒而改變。

bullish.title: Live On CNBC, Rob Sechan Announces Bought ServiceNow; Sold Adobe
bullish.reason: 知名投資人公開表示買入 ServiceNow，顯示專業投資圈對其價值認可。

bullish.title: Vonage Voice AI Tie Up Puts ServiceNow Platform And Valuation In Focus
bullish.reason: 與 Vonage 的語音 AI 整合，進一步豐富了 ServiceNow 的平台生態系統。

bullish.title: Is ServiceNow, Inc. (NOW) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
bullish.reason: 市場分析師提出的看漲論點，為股價提供了一定的支撐信心。

bullish.title: Should You Invest in ServiceNow (NOW) Based on Bullish Wall Street Views?
bullish.reason: 華爾街平均評級維持買入，顯示機構對其基本面仍持正面看法。

bearish.title: Redburn Lowers ServiceNow (NOW) Price Target to $215
bearish.reason: 分析師下調目標價，直接對市場預期造成負面壓力。

bearish.title: Here's Why ServiceNow (NOW) Fell More Than Broader Market
bearish.reason: 股價單日下跌 5.68 %，表現弱於大盤，顯示短期賣壓沉重。

bearish.title: ServiceNow and Salesforce Fall 5%: Is the Market Mispricing Both NOW and CRM?
bearish.reason: 與 Salesforce 同步下跌，反映出市場對軟體產業估值的集體修正擔憂。

bearish.title: Jim Cramer on ServiceNow: “I Think the Stock’s Going to Be in for a Little Bit More Turbulence Than It Already Has Been”
bearish.reason: 知名評論員 Jim Cramer 警告股價將面臨更多波動，影響散戶信心。

bearish.title: LiveRamp, Sprout Social, 8x8, Intuit, and ServiceNow Stocks Trade Down, What You Need To Know
bearish.reason: Anthropic 的 Claude AI 競爭威脅導致市場對 ServiceNow 的 AI 護城河產生疑慮。

bearish.title: Has Market Weakness Created A Fresh Opening In ServiceNow (NOW) Stock?
bearish.reason: 探討股價是否處於弱勢，暗示短期內缺乏強勁的上漲催化劑。

bearish.title: NowVertical Group Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Earnings Release Date
bearish.reason: 此為 NowVertical (TSXV: NOW) 的新聞，因代碼混淆可能導致投資人誤判，對 ServiceNow 構成干擾。

neutral.title: ServiceNow Earnings Preview: What to Expect
neutral.reason: 市場對即將公布的財報預期，屬於事件前瞻，尚未產生實際股價影響。

neutral.title: ServiceNow’s HR Chief Looks to Middle Managers to Ease AI Anxiety
neutral.reason: 關於公司內部 AI 轉型與員工心理建設的討論，屬於企業文化範疇。

neutral.title: The Role of "AI Enablement" in HR
neutral.reason: 探討 HR 在 AI 時代的角色，屬於公司策略宣導，對股價影響有限。

neutral.title: Why AI Won’t Kill the Entry-Level Job
neutral.reason: CFO 對 AI 就業影響的觀點，旨在穩定市場對 AI 負面影響的預期。

neutral.title: Here's How Much $100 Invested In ServiceNow 10 Years Ago Would Be Worth Today
neutral.reason: 歷史績效回顧，對當前股價走勢無直接影響。
